patch.description: Updates local RealmKit user settings only. Provider-owned username, email, credentials, MFA, and login identifiers cannot be updated here.

get.description: Returns a provider account settings URL when supported by the configured provider. RealmKit does not update provider-owned identity fields directly.

RateLimit-Remaining.description: Remaining requests in the current window.

RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the window resets.

parameters.name: page_token
parameters.description: Cursor returned by the previous page.

CorrelationId.description: Correlation identifier shared across related work.

ETag.description: Numeric resource version wrapped as an entity tag.

RateLimitLimit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the current window.

RateLimitRemaining.description: Remaining requests in the current window.

RateLimitReset.description: Unix timestamp when the current limit window resets.

DevUserIDHeader.name: X-RealmKit-Dev-User-ID
DevUserIDHeader.description: Development-only local user bypass header. Ignored outside development and not a production auth mechanism.

ForumSearchQuery.name: query
ForumSearchQuery.description: Search text. The q alias is also accepted by the HTTP adapter.

PreconditionRequired.description: A required precondition header is missing

required.description: Asset-owned metadata definitions must keep this false.
Asset-owned metadata definitions must keep this false.

author_post_edit_window_seconds.description: Author self-edit window in seconds. -1 disables author self-edit.

author_post_delete_window_seconds.description: Author self-delete window in seconds. -1 disables author self-delete.

actor_user_id.description: Local actor user ID. Omit or send the zero UUID for anonymous public checks.

scope_id.description: Target resource ID. Permission checks must use a concrete resource ID.

context.description: Module-provided fields reserved for future conditional grants.

duration.description: Go duration string such as 10m, 30m, or 24h.

subject_id.description: Required for user/group. Public and authenticated use reserved IDs.

scope_id.description: Granted resource ID. The zero UUID grants this action for every resource of the scope type.
Granted resource ID. Use the zero UUID to grant this action for every resource of the scope type.
